mapper.insert: insert into tbl_news_reply (member_id, news_id, content, reply_status) values (#{memberId}, #{newsId}, #{content}, coalesce(#{replyStatus}, 'active'))
mapper.select: select r.id, r.member_id, r.news_id, r.content, r.reply_status, to_char(r.created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as created_datetime, to_char(r.updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updated_datetime, m.member_name, m.member_handle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = r.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_news_reply_like rl where rl.reply_id = r.id) as like_count, false as liked from tbl_news_reply r join tbl_member m on r.member_id = m.id where r.id = #{id}

select r.id, r.member_id, r.news_id, r.content, r.reply_status, to_char(r.created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as created_datetime, to_char(r.updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updated_datetime, m.member_name, m.member_handle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = r.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_news_reply_like rl where rl.reply_id = r.id) as like_count,
exists( select 1 from tbl_news_reply_like rl2 where rl2.reply_id = r.id and rl2.member_id = #{currentMemberId} ) as liked
false as liked
from tbl_news_reply r join tbl_member m on r.member_id = m.id where r.news_id = #{newsId} and r.reply_status = 'active'
order by like_count desc, r.created_datetime desc
order by r.created_datetime desc
select count(*) from tbl_news_reply where news_id = #{newsId} and reply_status = 'active'
